summary: Classified the 10 open PRs in this live inventory shard using the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive items were detected. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening action is safe or permitted for this shard; several green or author-active PRs need maintainer judgment, while the remaining PRs should stay open as independent/related non-mutating inventory items.

actions.reason: Active author follow-up plus a latest bot review still marked needs changes leaves an unresolved maintainer/technical decision; keep open and do not mutate.

Related to an open issue but blocked by failed proof; keep open without mutation.
